headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.gstatic.com https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://bank.gov.ua https://api.allorigins.win https://api.privatbank.ua https://www.google.com https://apis.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; frame-src https://www.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.web.app https://content.googleapis.com; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

headers.comment: sw.js + the js/ module graph must always revalidate, or Firebase Hosting's default max-age=3600 lets the browser HTTP-cache them for an hour — which delays the service-worker update check AND lets a freshly-installed worker's cache.addAll() re-cache stale JS. no-cache means 'revalidate before use' (a tiny 304 when unchanged), not 'never cache', so offline still works via the SW cache.

headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), usb=(), payment=(), interest-cohort=()
